title: Just Enough Optimisations (JEO)
description: A modpack focused solely to pure performance.
body:
![JEO Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4461281ca64bef02799689477833ffd39bc13314.webp)JEO(Just Enough Optimisations) is a modpack focused on pure performance.
It adds no custom content, it just
makes sure that you get no lag and high FPS.

_For modpack developers: You can use JEO as a base for your modpacks, to improve your performance. I only ask that you provide a link back to this page if you go on and publish your modpack._


<details>
<summary>Modlist</summary>
  
-  C2ME
  
- Cull Less Leaves
 
- DashLoader

- Distant Horizons
  
- Dynamic FPS
  
- Embeddium
  
- Enhanced Block Entities
  
- Entity Culling
  
- Fast Load
  
- Fast Quit
  
- FerriteCore
  
- ImmediatelyFast
  
- Iris Shaders
  
- Lithium
  
- Model Gap Fix
  
- ModernFix
  
- More Culling
  
- More Culling Extra

</details>
